chapter_title.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْحُرَّةِ تَحْتَ الْمَمْلُوكِ وَ الْمَمْلُوكَةِ تَحْتَ الْحُرِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 74 – Divorce of the free woman under the owned slave, and the slave woman under the free man

text: إِنَّ ابْنَ شُبْرُمَةَ قَالَ الطَّلَاقُ لِلرَّجُلِ فَقَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الطَّلَاقُ لِلنِّسَاءِ وَ تِبْيَانُ ذَلِكَ أَنَّ الْعَبْدَ يَكُونُ تَحْتَهُ الْحُرَّةُ فَيَكُونُ تَطْلِيقُهَا ثَلَاثاً وَ يَكُونُ الْحُرُّ تَحْتَهُ الْأَمَةُ فَيَكُونُ طَلَاقُهَا تَطْلِيقَتَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, and Al Razzaz, from Ayoub Bin Nuh, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Ays Bin Al Qasim who said,

‘Ibn Shubrama (a judge) said, ‘The divorce is for the men’. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is for the women, and the proof of that is that the slave happens to have the free woman under him, so it happens that her divorces are three, and there happens to be the free man under whom is the slave girl, so her divorce happens to be two divorces’.
